series_metadata.series_title: High Volume Commercial Dog Breeder License
series_metadata.series_description: Applications,License, State & Federal Background Checks, Insurance or Bond Certificates, Affidavits, Photo's, Background Reimbursement Forms & Proof of Receipt, Correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and verified as readable. ; Electronic: 2 years including all renewals, or 2 years after denial, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
